What is this ranking?
The Gaussianhoops NCAA Ranking scores every player in the 2025-26 season using a composite formula that adjusts for conference strength. Production, efficiency, defense and context are combined into a single percentile score from 0 to 100.

Rank is a percentile score (0-100) across four components. Conference level is baked in before scoring.

Production (35%) - PPG, RPG, APG and MPG multiplied by a conference weight.

Efficiency (30%) - True Shooting %, PER, and AST/TO ratio.

Defense (15%) - Steal rate, block rate, total rebound rate.

Context (20%) - Role and tier level.

Conference weights: Power 5: 100% · High-Major: 88% · Mid-Major: 76% · Low-Major: 58%

TierConferences
Power 5ACC, B10, B12, Big East, SEC
High-MajorA-10, AAC, MVC, MWC, WCC
Mid-MajorCAA, C-USA, IVY, MAC, OVC, SoCon, WAC...
Low-MajorAEC, A-Sun, BSky, MEAC, NEC, Patriot, SWAC...
